name: Gruene & River Area
summary: The iconic Gruene Historic District and surrounding river neighborhoods offer a unique blend of Texas heritage and Hill Country beauty. Homes range from historic cottages to luxury riverfront estates with direct access to the Guadalupe River and Gruene Hall.

name: Downtown & Central
summary: The heart of New Braunfels with walkable streets, historic architecture, and proximity to the Comal River. A mix of charming bungalows, updated homes, and new infill construction at attainable price points.

name: River Chase
summary: A popular master-planned community in northwest New Braunfels with resort-style amenities. Families love the community pool, splash pad, trails, and Comal ISD schools.

name: Vintage Oaks
summary: The premier luxury community in New Braunfels, offering 1-14 acre homesites with stunning Hill Country views. Amenities include a Tuscan clubhouse, pools, lazy river, and miles of trails.

name: Copper Ridge
summary: An established and well-loved neighborhood in northwest New Braunfels with tree-lined streets and walking trails. A solid choice for families wanting Comal ISD schools at a moderate price point.

name: Veramendi
summary: A massive 2,400-acre master-planned community that is one of the largest developments in the Hill Country. Multiple builders offer a wide range of home styles from starter homes to executive properties.

name: Mayfair
summary: A newer SouthStar community in the Comal ISD area offering modern floor plans at competitive prices. Great for first-time buyers and young families looking for new construction.

name: Legacy at Lake Dunlap
summary: A sought-after community with lake access to Lake Dunlap on the Guadalupe River. Residents enjoy waterfront living, kayaking, and fishing with the convenience of being close to I-35.

name: Voss Farms
summary: A family-friendly master-planned community east of I-35 with a strong sense of community. Multiple builders and a range of price points make it accessible for many buyers.

name: Pecan Crossing
summary: One of the most affordable newer communities in the New Braunfels area, located east of I-35. A great option for first-time buyers seeking new construction in Comal ISD.

name: Manor Creek
summary: A premium neighborhood featuring Hill Country-sized lots and custom-quality homes. The rolling terrain and mature oaks give Manor Creek a more rural feel while still being minutes from town.
